item.title: Master Programmatic Video: Auto-Generate Dynamic Highlight Reels with FFmpeg & Python | إتقان الفيديو البرمجي: التوليد التلقائي لمقاطع الفيديو البارزة الديناميكية باستخدام FFmpeg وبايثون
item.description: Learn to build a powerful Python pipeline that leverages FFmpeg to automatically create engaging video highlight reels from raw footage and data. This guide equips you with the skills to generate dynamic video content at scale, complete with custom overlays and transitions.

item.title: Master Automated Code Generation with DeepSeek Coder (R1) & Python: From Prompt to Production-Ready Code | إتقان توليد الكود التلقائي باستخدام DeepSeek Coder (R1) وبايثون: من الموجه إلى الكود الجاهز للإنتاج
item.description: Learn how to integrate DeepSeek Coder with Python to build an automated code generation pipeline, from setting up your environment to crafting effective prompts and incorporating basic automated testing. This guide empowers developers to create functional, production-ready code snippets with AI, significantly boosting productivity.

item.title: Master Local LLM Automation with n8n & Ollama: Privacy-First Workflows | إتقان أتمتة LLM المحلية باستخدام n8n و Ollama: سير عمل يحفظ الخصوصية أولاً
item.description: Learn how to integrate local large language models (LLMs) via Ollama directly into n8n, enabling powerful, privacy-focused automation without cloud API dependencies. This guide walks you through setting up your local AI environment and building your first n8n workflow for secure, offline processing.

item.title: Master Data-Driven Video Shorts: Generate Financial News with Remotion & Google Gemini 1.5 | إتقان مقاطع الفيديو القصيرة المبنية على البيانات: إنشاء أخبار مالية باستخدام Remotion و Google Gemini 1.5
item.description: Learn to build an automated pipeline for generating data-driven financial news videos optimized for YouTube Shorts using Remotion, Node.js, and Google Gemini 1.5. This guide provides a step-by-step approach to scripting, rendering, and orchestrating dynamic video content at scale.

item.title: Automate Personalized Social Media Intro Videos with Remotion & Node.js | أتمتة مقاطع فيديو المقدمة المخصصة لوسائل التواصل الاجتماعي باستخدام Remotion و Node.js
item.description: Learn how to build an automated pipeline using Remotion and Node.js to generate unique, personalized intro videos at scale for social media. This guide covers dynamic data integration and server-side rendering.

item.title: Master Autonomous Document Processing with n8n & DeepSeek V3: Extract & Summarize at Scale | إتقان معالجة المستندات المستقلة باستخدام n8n و DeepSeek V3: استخلاص وتلخيص على نطاق واسع
item.description: Learn to build a powerful n8n workflow that leverages DeepSeek V3's long context window to autonomously extract structured data and generate concise summaries from any document. This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial with practical code to automate complex information processing.

item.title: Programmatic Video Snippet Generation with Remotion & LLMs: Turn Long-Form Content into Engaging Social Clips | توليد مقاطع فيديو مبرمجة باستخدام Remotion ونماذج اللغة الكبيرة (LLMs): حوّل المحتوى الطويل إلى مقاطع اجتماعية جذابة
item.description: Discover how to transform lengthy articles or videos into captivating social media snippets using Remotion for dynamic video rendering and Large Language Models (LLMs) for intelligent content extraction. This guide provides a step-by-step pipeline to automate the creation of viral-ready clips from your existing content library.

item.title: Build a Hyper-Personalized Email Engine with n8n & Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Full Guide) | بناء محرك بريد إلكتروني فائق التخصيص باستخدام n8n و Claude 3.5 Sonnet (دليل كامل)
item.description: Learn to create an advanced n8n workflow that leverages Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Sonnet to generate highly personalized emails at scale. This guide covers everything from setting up your API keys to crafting intelligent prompts for dynamic content generation.

item.title: Master LLM Function Calling with n8n: Build an AI-Powered Data Lookup Agent using Google Gemini 1.5 Pro | إتقان استدعاء وظائف نماذج اللغة الكبيرة (LLM) باستخدام n8n: بناء وكيل بحث بيانات مدعوم بالذكاء الاصطناعي باستخدام Google Gemini 1.5 Pro
item.description: Unlock the true potential of AI automation by mastering LLM function calling within n8n. This guide shows you how to build an intelligent data lookup agent using Google Gemini 1.5 Pro to interact with external systems and provide dynamic, accurate answers.

item.title: Automate LinkedIn Engagement: Build a Python Playwright Bot for Likes & Comments | أتمتة تفاعل LinkedIn: بناء بوت Python Playwright للإعجابات والتعليقات
item.description: Learn to build a powerful Python bot using Playwright to automate LinkedIn post likes and comments. This guide provides step-by-step instructions to boost your professional network's visibility and engagement efficiently.

item.title: Master Automated Code Review with DeepSeek V3 & n8n (Full Workflow Guide) | إتقان مراجعة الكود الآلية باستخدام DeepSeek V3 و n8n (دليل سير العمل الكامل)
item.description: Learn to build a powerful n8n workflow that leverages DeepSeek V3 to perform automated code reviews, providing instant feedback and refactoring suggestions. Streamline your development process and enhance code quality effortlessly.

item.title: Master Automated Social Media Content Generation with n8n & Google Gemini 1.5 Flash | إتقان إنشاء محتوى وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي الآلي باستخدام n8n و Google Gemini 1.5 Flash
item.description: This guide teaches you how to build a powerful n8n workflow to automatically generate diverse social media posts using Google Gemini 1.5 Flash, saving you countless hours of manual content creation. Learn to engineer prompts, process AI outputs, and prepare content for seamless multi-platform scheduling.

item.title: Automate Educational Video Creation: Python, MoviePy & LLM-Generated Scripts | أتمتة إنشاء مقاطع الفيديو التعليمية: بايثون، MoviePy، وسكريبتات من نماذج اللغة الكبيرة (LLM)
item.description: Learn how to build an automated pipeline to generate educational videos programmatically using Python, MoviePy, and AI-generated scripts. This guide empowers developers and creators to scale content production efficiently.

item.title: Master Dynamic Web Scraping: Python & Playwright for Complex Data Extraction | إتقان استخراج البيانات الديناميكية من الويب: بايثون وبلاي رايت لاستخلاص البيانات المعقدة
item.description: Learn to build powerful web scrapers using Python and Playwright, mastering techniques to navigate dynamic websites, handle JavaScript-rendered content, and extract complex data efficiently. This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial for robust automation.

item.title: Master Self-Hosted n8n with Docker Compose for Secure AI Workflows (Claude 3.5 Sonnet Example) | إتقان استضافة n8n ذاتيًا باستخدام Docker Compose لسير عمل الذكاء الاصطناعي الآمن (مثال Claude 3.5 Sonnet)
item.description: This guide provides a step-by-step tutorial on deploying a secure, self-hosted n8n instance using Docker Compose on a Virtual Private Server (VPS), and then integrating it with Claude 3.5 Sonnet for advanced AI-powered content generation workflows.
